courses.title: Sales Baptism
courses.subtitle: Sales training program for beginners
courses.description: Sales Baptism is curated for sales freshers and beginners. It covers discovering the sales function, fears and apprehensions, stress in sales, and sales leadership through prerecorded learning and workbooks.

courses.title: Sales Marathon
courses.subtitle: Condensed online sales management course
courses.description: Sales Marathon focuses on the how of sales through a seven-day practical learning format. It helps salespeople understand lead generation, sales pitch, need analysis, objection handling, negotiation, and customer lifetime value.

courses.title: Sales ManEdge
courses.subtitle: Online course for new sales managers
courses.description: Sales ManEdge is curated for salespeople who have moved into sales management. It covers sales management process, CRM, market sensing, Ansoff Matrix, team motivation, forecasting, MIS, and customer relationship management.

courses.title: Sales Ki Pathshala
courses.subtitle: Weekly live sales training school
courses.description: Sales Ki Pathshala is a weekly virtual sales training school for CEOs, entrepreneurs, and sales managers. It covers sales topics such as prospecting, lead generation, pitching, objections, negotiation, CRM, customer loyalty, and retention.

courses.title: Sales Ki Jaat
courses.subtitle: Install the DNA of sales in the team
courses.description: Sales Ki Jaat helps sales teams acquire the DNA of sales so they overcome fear of failure, fear of rejection, fear of asking questions, and build confidence in pitching and closing.

courses.title: Sales Ki Vidhi
courses.subtitle: Sales process and sales funnel program
courses.description: Sales Ki Vidhi answers how to sell by focusing on sales lifecycle, process, methods, techniques, funnel ratios, and frameworks such as Action Selling, PEAK, SPANCO, and SPACER.

courses.title: Sales Ki Niti
courses.subtitle: Sales strategy and planning
courses.description: Sales Ki Niti focuses on sales planning, sales techniques, strategic selling process, and winning sales strategy for improving sales outcomes.

courses.title: Sales Mein Molbhav
courses.subtitle: Sales negotiation skills
courses.description: Sales Mein Molbhav focuses on the sales negotiation process, negotiation skills, negotiation tactics, bargaining skills, and value protection in sales management.

courses.title: Sales Katha
courses.subtitle: Storytelling for sales
courses.description: Sales Katha explains how storytelling helps customers understand the science of sales. It supports FAB and FAQ communication with stories that make selling more relatable.

courses.title: Sales Ke Rishte
courses.subtitle: Customer relationship management system
courses.description: Sales Ke Rishte is a proprietary customer relationship management system focused on customer relationship tools and customer lifetime value.

blogs.title: Why Sales Training Cannot Be Skipped
blogs.excerpt: Sales training becomes costly when it is skipped because teams lose confidence, process discipline, and measurable selling behaviour.
blogs.content: Consult4Sales describes sales training as expensive only when it is not taken. A trained salesperson understands the function of sales, handles fear and rejection better, asks better questions, and converts learning into field action.
blogs.author: Strategic Concepts

blogs.title: Growth Consulting for SME and MSME Sales
blogs.excerpt: SME and MSME growth depends on a complete sales ecosystem, winning teams, technology enablement, and strategy.
blogs.content: Consult4Sales works with SME and MSME businesses to improve sales performance by leveraging the opportunities already present in their business landscape. The consulting areas include sales ecosystem design, customer persona, lead magnets, value bombs, sales process, sales kit, metrics, negotiation process, CRM, MIS, business analytics, KRA, KPI, and go-to-market planning.
blogs.author: Strategic Concepts

blogs.title: Sales DNA and the Confidence to Sell
blogs.excerpt: Sales Ki Jaat positions sales DNA as a learnable capability that reduces fear and improves pitching and closing.
blogs.content: The Sales Ki Jaat program explains that the DNA of sales is not available by birth; it is acquired through training and practice. The program focuses on reducing fear of failure, fear of rejection, fear of asking questions, and fear of challenging self.
blogs.author: Strategic Concepts

blogs.title: How a Defined Sales Process Improves Conversion
blogs.excerpt: Sales Ki Vidhi focuses on the journey from lead generation to closure through funnel ratios and repeatable sales process design.
blogs.content: A sales process answers how to sell. Consult4Sales frames this through the sales lifecycle and the movement from top of funnel to middle of funnel and bottom of funnel. The process covers lead generation, warm lead engagement, sales pitch, objections, proposals, negotiation, closure, and customer lifetime value.
blogs.author: Strategic Concepts

blogs.title: Sales Negotiation Is More Than Discounting
blogs.excerpt: Sales Mein Molbhav treats negotiation as a structured sales management capability, not only price bargaining.
blogs.content: In sales management, negotiation is a special process that includes skills, tactics, bargaining behaviour, objection handling, and value protection. A salesperson must understand when to propose, how to respond to price pressure, and how to close without weakening the value of the solution.
blogs.author: Strategic Concepts

downloads.title: Sales Management Audit System Checklist
downloads.description: A five-page checklist covering sales kit, DSR, sales policy, MIS, sales process, market intelligence, CRM, customer centricity, reference selling, cross selling, dashboard management, and service recovery.

downloads.title: Strategic Concepts Brochure
downloads.description: Complete Strategic Concepts brochure available from the Consult4Sales downloads section.

downloads.title: Checklist for Lead Assessment in Direct Selling
downloads.description: Checklist resource for assessing leads in a direct selling model.

downloads.title: Annual Sales Planning Workbook
downloads.description: Workbook resource for annual sales planning.

downloads.title: Sales Workbooks Collection
downloads.description: Collection of workbooks including annual sales planning, rural marketing, capacity building, counselors, sales negotiations, lead generation, sales closing, ownership cost, CEO role in sales management, and sales audit system.

downloads.title: Sales Checklists Collection
downloads.description: Collection of checklists for lead assessment, sales management audit, FMCG sales managers, SME CEO sales management, distributor tracking, customer complaints, need analysis, sales training, and channel distribution.

downloads.title: Client Testimonials
downloads.description: Client appreciation and testimonial collection for sales training and consulting work.

downloads.title: LinkedIn Recommendations
downloads.description: Professional recommendations and endorsements for Sanjay Singh and Strategic Concepts.
